name: project-proof
description: Before/after photo proof and job report app for small projects.

scripts.sync:www: mkdir -p www/assets && cp index.html app.js styles.css manifest.webmanifest www/ && cp -R assets/. www/assets/
scripts.build:apk: npm run check && npm run sync:www && node ../MLB-Stats-Tracker/node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android && cd android && gradle --no-daemon -Dkotlin.compiler.execution.strategy=in-process -Dkotlin.incremental=false -Pandroid.aapt2FromMavenOverride=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/aapt2 -PlocalSdk34 -Pkotlin_version=2.2.0 assembleDebug
